name: West Indian Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds shrimp, cooked, drained and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet until it begins to smoke.
2. Quickly sauté the shrimp, stirring occasionally until they are heated through and lightly browned.
3. Stir in the Angostura bitters and herbs (dried chervil, marjoram, thyme, cumin seed, and saffron).
4. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
5. Broil the skillet for a few minutes until the Parmesan is lightly browned and bubbling.
